title: Commercial office, Type V-B, 4 stories over the sprinklered Group B / V-B limit of 3
notes: Tests IBC Table 504.4: NS row 2 + sprinkler story (504.2) = 3 allowed; 4 stories fails. (Previously authored as 3 stories against an inverted sprinkler model.)
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS
Occupancy: B
Type: V-B
Stories: 4
Height: 48 ft
Area per story: 6,000 sf
Sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13)
Occupant load: 120
Fire alarm per NFPA 72.
Accessible parking, accessible route, ADA restroom, braille signage.
IECC energy code compliance. Ventilation rate outdoor air per IMC 403.
Panic hardware. Main breaker 600 A service. CALGreen low-flow. Construction waste management plan.
